objectives.description: Add focus_prompt extraction in Stage 1 after session_id extraction
Append focus_prompt suffix to research dispatch prompt in State not_started
Append focus_prompt suffix to plan dispatch prompt in State researched
Append focus_prompt suffix to implement dispatch prompt in State planned/implementing
Append focus_prompt suffix to resume implement dispatch in State partial
Append focus_prompt suffix to blocker escalation Stage 6 Step 5 re-implement dispatch
